notes: Predator NES is a platformer adaptation with dual world-states (Normal Mode vs Big Mode) communicated primarily through screen transitions and difficulty escalation rather than environmental color or faction-specific visual markers. The game uses title screen imagery (Schaefer vs Predator) to establish narrative duality. Regional differences in difficulty and level ordering suggest world-state variations based on release territory. The source data does not document specific visual color schemes, environmental hazard indicators, or detailed faction visual differentiation beyond sprite-based entity presence.
